message:
test(fuzz): add Value::Array canonicalization branch fuzz target (resolves y98gt)

The Array branch of canonicalize_value_in_place (lib.rs:502-506) is
positionally distinct from Map (arrays preserve insertion order) and
dispatches recursive canonicalization to every element. Existing fuzz
coverage for canonicalization (canonicalize_map_deterministic +
cbor_map_canonical_relations) is map-biased; the Array recursion is
untested as a discrete surface.

Properties asserted:
- order preservation: Array([a,b,c]) bytes ≠ Array([c,b,a]) when not
  all-equal-under-canonical (regression: a sorted-Array bug would pass
  the map suite but break content-addressing for arrays)
- recursive -0.0 normalization inside Array
- recursive map-inside-array canonicalization (a Map nested in an Array
  MUST still get sorted/deduped)

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) [1,2,3] vs [3,2,1] MUST canonicalize to different bytes
- (b) Array containing NaN MUST trip NonFiniteFloat (recursion gate)
- (c) Array nested MAX_CANONICALIZATION_DEPTH+10 levels MUST trip
  DepthExceeded or PayloadTooLarge — guards stack-exhaustion DoS via
  deeply-nested arrays

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -482,5 +482,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_cbor_array_canonical"
+path = "fuzz_targets/cbor_array_canonical.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
